response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience with strong technical breadth and some developer tooling exposure (CI/CD setup, test frameworks in D, MCP code generators, Selenium course creation). However, the resume shows no formal people-management or team-leadership role, no mobile-platform ecosystem experience at scale, and limited evidence of building developer tools/build systems/test infrastructure as a primary focus. The role explicitly requires 2 years people management and 3 years technical leadership, neither of which is clearly demonstrated.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across 13+ years and diverse stacks
Some developer-tooling background: CI/CD setup, test runner (Trial), assertion library, Selenium training
Demonstrated knowledge sharing through workshops, talks, and courses
concerns: No explicit people-management or direct-reports experience listed
Limited mobile-platform ecosystem experience (brief iOS/Apple TV stint in 2015-2016)
Developer tools work is side-project scale, not building/leading dev-productivity teams
